creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to jakub_lach from comment #17)

Above being:

> KLD linuxkpi_gplv2.ko: depends on firmware - not available or version mismatch
> linker_load_file: /boot/modules/linuxkpi_gplv2.ko - unsupported file type
> KLD drm.ko: depends on linuxkpi_gplv2 - not available or version mismatch

I do not use packages in general.
